articles.title: 150 million users later, Roblox competitor Rec Room is shutting down
articles.description: Rec Room, a Roblox-like social gaming platform that lets users create games and experiences for others to play, is shutting down on June 1st. Despite reaching more than 150 million players and creators and, at one point, being valued at $3.5 billion, the company says in a blog post that "we never quite figured out […]
articles.author: Jay Peters
